title: A Hair Off the Floor

mood.label: Heavy going 🌧️
mood.summary: The US-Iran war grinds through a fourth night of strikes and a burning hull in Hormuz, but a dropped transit toll, easing oil and a cooler 3.5-percent inflation read lift the day a single point to 39 — heavy going held a hair off the floor, with far-off grief in Sudan, Congo and Bangkok and two small lights from orbit and the World Cup.

style.genre: flute-led cinematic soul / slow downtempo — a sampled gm_flute tracing a circling Eb melodic-minor topline over warm gm_epiano1 electric-piano chords, a bowed-string pad holding the weight, a plucked gm_acoustic_bass walking the roots with a sine sub beneath, a soft brushed RhythmAce kit through light reverb, and sparse glockenspiel glints for the day's two bright threads; melodic minor's raised sixth and seventh lifting the minor third just enough to keep the calm honest and unsettled — a heavy war-morning held a hair off the floor as the market's dread eased, and deliberately no harp, piano or clarinet after the last week's run

sampleSources: Strudel default library (gm_flute lead, gm_epiano1 chords, gm_acoustic_bass, VCSL strings & glockenspiel, RhythmAce drum machine, sine sub)
pattern:
stack(
  s("bd ~ ~ ~ bd ~ ~ ~, ~ ~ ~ ~ rim ~ ~ ~, hh ~ hh ~ hh ~ hh ~").bank("RhythmAce").gain(0.4).room(0.3).hpf(90),
  note("<[ef3,gf3,bf3] [af2,c4,ef4] [bf2,d4,f4] [c3,ef4,gf4]>").s("gm_epiano1").attack(0.02).release(1.3).gain(0.4).lpf(sine.range(900,1800).slow(16)).room(0.34),
  note("<[ef2,bf2] [af2,ef3] [bf2,f3] [c3,gf3]>").s("strings").attack(1.4).sustain(0.85).release(2.8).gain(0.16).lpf(1200).room(0.55).rsize(4).hpf(110),
  note("<[ef2 f2] [af2 c3] [bf2 c3] [c3 bf2]>").s("gm_acoustic_bass").attack(0.01).release(1.1).gain(0.32).lpf(760).off(0.5, x=>x.gain(0.1).lpf(640)),
  note("<ef1 af1 bf1 c2>").s("sine").gain(0.3).lpf(180).attack(0.05).release(1.8),
  note("<[ef5 ~ gf5 bf5 ~ af5 ~ f5] [d5 ~ c5 ~ bf4 ~ ~ ef5] [gf5 ~ f5 ~ ef5 ~ d5 ~] [c5 ~ ~ bf4 ~ af4 ~ ~]>").s("gm_flute").attack(0.05).release(0.6).gain(perlin.range(0.26,0.38).slow(7)).lpf(3000).room(0.4).delay(0.28).delaytime(0.375).delayfeedback(0.28).off(0.125, x=>x.gain(0.12)),
  note("<[~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ bf6 ~] ~ [~ ~ ef6 ~ ~ ~ ~ ~] ~>").s("glockenspiel").gain(0.18).room(0.55).delay(0.26).delaytime(0.5).pan(0.6)
)

lines: Fourth night the strait won't close, a hull still burning bright,
one crew member gone where the water meets the light.
A bar in Bangkok, thirty names lost in the smoke,
Sudan counts nineteen million and the planting almost broke.
So the world moves a hair off the floor,
thirty-nine, and the rain still at the door.
Heavy going, but not the worst before —
one small point, held against the dark.
Then somebody drops the toll and the crude comes down,
three point five, a kinder number for the town.
A kidney grown in orbit where there is no ground,
and Kane against Messi pulls the same old crowd.
So the world moves a hair off the floor,
thirty-nine, and the rain still at the door.
Heavy going, but not the worst before —
one small point, held against the dark.
